finding_results.notes: Completed a manual structural pass across the chapter opening, the new on-page lunch-control sequence, and the dinner aftermath, then regenerated the required revision report with anchored chapter evidence.
The first Lena passage now enters through room control, chokepoints, and posted bodies. The ledger/counting demonstration and explanatory count dialogue were removed.
Viktor's re-entry keeps the deterioration detail through his crooked glasses only; the gray-hair re-description was cut from the same sentence.
Atmosphere now foregrounds decomposition smell and contamination pressure. The repeated hum/buzz/drone inventory constructions were removed.
The closing beat now lands in tactile cold, residual food smell, and sealed-air consequence instead of the reused 'sits/listens to the building' auditory template.

Added causally necessary material: a public lunch enforcement scene that seeds the later raid, a dinner aftermath that proves the new order, deeper Chen Wei negotiation logic, and a more concrete body-storage calculation. Final chapter word count: 4597.

pass_summaries.summary: Rebuilt Chapter 7 around public food control instead of re-teaching Lena's inventory habit, brought Viktor's failure on-page at lunch, strengthened the causal runway into the cafeteria raid and dinner aftermath, removed the recurring ambient-sound/listen-to-building formulas, and raised the chapter to 4597 words while preserving the Chapter 8 handoff.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=6, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
